description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open, spacious layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The front area includes a paved patio and a small green lawn, while the rear showcases a wooden pergola and a rectangular swimming pool. The exterior walls are primarily white with some wooden and gray accent panels, and the interior is divided into multiple rooms, including a kitchen, living area, and bedrooms. The design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional outdoor spaces. The bungalow is surrounded by low boundary walls, offering privacy while maintaining an open feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a front patio, and a backyard featuring a pergola and pool. The design is open, bright, and emphasizes indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved patio, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, large windows, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden pergola, pool, and extensive patio space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, pergola, and the open living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
